name: default
description: Basic building templates for exploration and world-building.

templates.name: Dirt Road
templates.description: A dusty, worn path winding through the wasteland.

templates.name: Stone Road
templates.description: A well-paved road made of flat, white stone slabs.

templates.name: Lush Grass
templates.description: Thick, knee-high grass swaying gently in the breeze.

templates.name: Dense Forest
templates.description: Ancient trees form a thick canopy here, blocking most of the light.

templates.name: Dark Cave
templates.description: The air is damp and cold within the echoing hollows of the cave.

templates.name: Mountain Peak
templates.description: The air is thin and freezing at this extreme altitude.

templates.name: In-Door
templates.description: A structured interior space protected from the elements.
